prestazioni: Engine swap to a **6VD1** 3.2L V6 (from the Isuzu Trooper) with a **Garrett GT3582R turbocharger**, custom **Tomei 272° camshafts**, and a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** for precise fuel and ignition mapping. Supporting mods include a **GReddy intercooler kit** and a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** to handle 18 psi of boost, targeting 350whp on 93 octane.

Full **ISUZU UBS (Utility Body System) chassis reinforcement** with a **Cusco bolt-in 4-point roll cage** and **Polyurethane bushings** from **Energy Suspension** (part #9.5111G) to eliminate flex under hard acceleration. Pair with **KW Variant 3 coilovers** (specifically valved for the Rodeo’s 5-link rear suspension) and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars** (24mm front, 22mm rear) for reduced body roll.

Drivetrain upgrades including a **Centerforce DFX clutch** (dual-friction, 2600lb clamp load) mated to a **Tremec TKO-600 6-speed manual transmission** (adapted via a **Novak ISU-TKO bellhousing**). Final drive ratio set to **4.56:1** with a **Detroit Truetrac limited-slip differential** and **Motive Gear 30-spline axles** to handle the power.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Widebody Kit** (modified for Rodeo’s unique frame rails) with **custom carbon fiber fender flares** (hand-laid by **Seibon Carbon**) and **Functional hood vents** (dual 4-inch outlets to direct air from the intercooler). Painted in **PPG ‘Isuzu Solar Yellow’ (code: YR3) with matte black accents**.

**OEM+ lighting upgrade** featuring **Morimoto XB LED headlights** (H11 bulb swap) with **Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED fog lights**, and a **custom rear LED bar** integrated into the tailgate (using **Anzo USA taillight housings** with sequential turn signals).

**Interior overhaul** with **Recaro SRD seats** (retrimmed in **Nappa leather with yellow Alcantara inserts**), a **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel** (350mm, flat-bottom) on a **Sparco hub adapter**, and a **custom gauge cluster** featuring **Defi Advance BF gauges** (boost, oil pressure, wideband AFR) mounted in a **Momo carbon fiber dash panel**.
